overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront commercial street. The clip begins in clear midday conditions with palm trees and a distant neon-lit skyline, then transitions through a busy pedestrian area with food vendors, before atmospheric fog rolls in creating a golden-hour haze that obscures visibility in the final seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront highway promenade with palm trees

events.description: blue sports car passes by on the highway to the right
camera begins steady forward movement along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk observing the futuristic city skyline and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the highway parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center median of the highway
cluster of neon-lit glass skyscrapers and a distinctive twisted tower in the distance
orange metal guardrail separating the pedestrian walkway from vehicle traffic
tall blue lamppost with modern design

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a clear sunny day along a futuristic waterfront highway. Palm trees line the road while a distinctive cyberpunk skyline rises in the distance. The camera moves forward past a blue lamppost, with moderate traffic flowing on the right and sparse pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food vendors and digital advertisements

events.description: entering denser commercial area with storefronts and outdoor food vendors
pedestrian density increases with multiple NPCs walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while passing food stalls and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing at teal food vendor counter
pedestrian in gray business suit walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: outdoor food kiosk with teal counter and digital menu displays
large digital advertisement screen displaying a horse image with text
modern commercial building with dark tinted glass facade
covered bus stop with glass panels and seating

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier commercial sidewalk lined with food vendors and digital billboards. The camera passes a teal food stall on the left where a person in yellow stands ordering. Pedestrians in various outfits walk in both directions, and the futuristic skyline shifts to the right background as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined boulevard transitioning to foggy conditions

events.description: atmospheric fog begins rolling in, creating a warm golden haze and reducing visibility
weather transitions from clear to hazy with significant reduction in long-distance visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as fog density increases and the lighting shifts to a diffused golden tone

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying an umbrella walking ahead into the increasing fog

entered.detail: large deciduous trees with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk
large green industrial ventilation units mounted on building exterior
covered patio area with tables and red umbrellas visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, atmospheric fog begins to roll in, diffusing the sunlight into a warm golden haze. Large street trees line the left side while HVAC equipment and outdoor cafe seating become visible. The distant skyline fades from view as visibility decreases, and pedestrians ahead appear as silhouettes against the bright fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-shrouded urban promenade with heavy atmospheric haze

events.description: heavy fog obscures all distant buildings, reducing visibility to less than 50 meters
pedestrian in red top passes close to camera on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking through dense fog with severely reduced visibility, navigating past silhouetted pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure with umbrella walking away into the dense fog
pedestrian in red top and yellow pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: short black and yellow posts marking the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment is dominated by heavy fog that creates a dreamlike golden atmosphere with extremely limited visibility. The camera continues forward past industrial HVAC units and sidewalk bollards, while pedestrians appear as dark silhouettes against the bright background. The futuristic cityscape is completely obscured, leaving only the immediate sidewalk and nearby trees visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic waterfront that transforms from a clear, sunny day into a dense, golden-hued fog. It begins on a bright highway lined with palm trees and a distant cyberpunk skyline, moving past a blue lamppost and flowing traffic. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a bustling commercial sidewalk filled with digital billboards and food vendors, including a teal stall where a customer in yellow stands. The scene then transitions as atmospheric fog rolls in, diffusing the sunlight into a warm haze that obscures the skyline and turns pedestrians into silhouettes. Finally, the visibility drops further into a dreamlike golden atmosphere, leaving only the immediate sidewalk, industrial HVAC units, and nearby trees visible through the heavy mist.
